description: Mobile UX overhaul: prominent mobile menu, fixed bottom navigation bar, text overflow fixes, scroll-to-top button, touch-friendly admin controls
steps: Create `src/components/MobileBottomNav.tsx`: A fixed bottom navigation bar visible only on mobile (hidden on md: and above). Shows 5 icons/labels in a row: Collection (Grid icon, scrolls to #collections), Lookbook (BookOpen icon, triggers onOpenLookbook prop), AI Stylist (Sparkles icon, scrolls to #style-quiz), Contact (Phone icon, scrolls to #contact), More (Menu icon, opens a slide-up panel with remaining links: About, Services, FAQ, and admin link if signed in). Style: fixed bottom-0 inset-x-0, bg-cream-100/95 backdrop-blur, border-t, dark mode support, safe-area-inset-bottom padding. Each item is a button with an icon (20px) and tiny label (9px uppercase). Active state in bronze.

In `src/App.tsx`: Import and render MobileBottomNav at the bottom of the component tree (after Footer, before FloatingWhatsApp). Pass onOpenLookbook prop. Adjust FloatingWhatsApp and Chatbot launcher positioning: add bottom padding (pb-16 or bottom-20) on mobile so they don't overlap with the new bottom nav.

In `src/components/Navbar.tsx`: Make the hamburger button more prominent on mobile - increase size to h-11 w-11, add a visible background (bg-bronze-500/10), and add text label 'Menu' next to the icon on small screens. Also ensure the mobile menu dropdown has enough z-index to not conflict with bottom nav.
In `src/components/FloatingWhatsApp.tsx`: Adjust mobile positioning to account for bottom nav - change bottom-5 to bottom-20 on mobile (so it sits above the new bottom nav bar).

In `src/components/Chatbot.tsx`: Adjust the launcher button positioning - change bottom-5/left-4 to bottom-20/left-4 on mobile so it clears the bottom nav. Also adjust the chat panel bottom position similarly.

Create `src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx`: A floating button that appears after scrolling down 400px. Uses ArrowUp icon from lucide-react. Fixed position, bottom-20 right-4 on mobile (above bottom nav), bottom-6 right-6 on desktop. Smooth scroll to top on click. Animated entrance/exit with opacity and translate.
In `src/App.tsx`: Import and render ScrollToTop component.

Fix text overflow in `src/components/Contact.tsx`: The ContactRow component's value text should have `break-all` or `overflow-wrap: anywhere` class to prevent email addresses from overflowing on narrow screens. Add `text-sm` to the value text on mobile. The tracking-[0.3em] labels should be reduced on mobile: use `tracking-[0.15em] sm:tracking-[0.3em]`.

Fix text overflow in `src/components/Footer.tsx`: Ensure the footer text wraps properly on 320px screens. Add `break-words` to the copyright text. Make the WhatsApp display number use `text-[10px] sm:text-xs` to fit narrow screens.
Fix text overflow in `src/components/Newsletter.tsx`: The FAITH_EMAIL display at the bottom should have `break-all` class. Ensure the form inputs don't overflow on very narrow screens.

Touch-friendly admin controls: In `src/components/EditableImage.tsx` make the 'Change' button larger on mobile (min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px]). In `src/components/EditableText.tsx` make the pencil icon button at least 44x44px tap target on mobile. Use classes like `h-10 w-10 sm:h-8 sm:w-8`.
Ensure About.tsx still uses pexels(3852974) for the designer image (a Black woman seamstress at sewing machine with measuring tape) - do NOT change this.
acceptance_criteria: MobileBottomNav.tsx exists with 5-item fixed bottom navigation
Bottom nav is hidden on md: screens and above (desktop)
FloatingWhatsApp and Chatbot launcher are positioned above the bottom nav on mobile
ScrollToTop button appears after scrolling and works correctly
Contact section email/address text does not overflow on 320px mobile
Footer text does not overflow on narrow screens
Admin edit buttons (EditableImage, EditableText) have 44px minimum touch targets on mobile
Navbar hamburger is more visible with background and larger size
